# Nexoverse Media

Nexoverse Media is a Miami-based digital agency serving Miami, Florida, the United States and remote clients worldwide.

Core services:
- Web design and website development
- Landing pages, custom WordPress websites and advanced e-commerce websites
- SEO and AIO optimization for Google, Bing and AI-assisted answer engines
- Website maintenance, hosting support, plugin updates and content growth plans
- AI automation, conversational bots, CRM automation and workflow automation
- Digital marketing, Google Ads, social media marketing and Google Business Profile growth
- Managed IT services for healthcare, law firms, finance, construction, distribution, retail, nonprofits, IT companies and small businesses

Primary contact:
- Email: cbatistafuentes@gmail.com
- Phone and WhatsApp: +1 786 492 0773
- Location: Miami, Florida
